evidence_summary: Establish the transition from the terrestrial Arizona landscape to a supernatural inciting event. The sequence must manage a significant lighting shift from high-altitude exterior brightness to the dim, ancient atmosphere of the cave interior while portrayi...

Carter's horse leads him to a narrow cave entrance on a high trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the large, ancient chamber. Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
Wide shots of the cave entrance on the cliff
